data.title: Aris Mining Uplists to NYSE as It Accelerates South American Gold Expansion
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Aris Mining ( (TSE:ARIS) ) has shared an update.

Aris Mining said on February 19, 2026 that its common shares have begun trading on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol ARIS, completing an uplisting from the NYSE American. The stock will continue to trade in Toronto under the same ticker, aligning the company’s presence across both major exchanges and potentially broadening its investor base.

To mark the NYSE debut, senior management planned to take part in the exchange’s closing bell ceremony on February 19, 2026. The move comes as Aris Mining ramps up production at its Segovia and Marmato mines in Colombia and advances its Toroparu and Soto Norte projects, reinforcing its strategy to grow into a larger South America-focused gold producer.

The NYSE uplisting is a notable milestone for a company founded in 2022, signaling confidence in its growth trajectory and governance standards. By securing a listing on a premier U.S. exchange while maintaining its TSX listing, Aris Mining strengthens visibility among global institutional investors and underscores its ambitions in the competitive gold mining industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ARIS) stock is a Buy with a C$26.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aris Mining stock, see the TSE:ARIS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ARIS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ARIS is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (strong margins and accelerating free cash flow) and a positive earnings call highlighting record operating results and improving cash position. These strengths are partially offset by expensive valuation (high P/E) and technically overbought signals that increase near-term pullback risk.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ARIS stock, click here.

More about Aris Mining

Aris Mining is a Vancouver-based gold producer focused on South America, with shares listed on both the TSX and NYSE under the symbol ARIS. Founded in September 2022, the company operates the Segovia and Marmato underground gold mines in Colombia, which produced about 257,000 ounces of gold in 2025, and is advancing large-scale development projects in Colombia and Guyana to significantly grow future output.

Beyond its operating mines, Aris Mining owns the Toroparu gold project in Guyana and the high-grade Soto Norte project in Colombia, both at advanced study stages. With plant expansions and new processing facilities underway, the company is targeting a medium-term production rate of 500,000 ounces per year and a longer-term objective of about 1 million ounces annually, aiming to build scale, diversification and stronger positioning in the gold mining sector.

Average Trading Volume: 1,030,412

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$5.12B

Learn more about ARIS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:

OVS S.p.A. ( (IT:OVS) ) has issued an announcement.

OVS S.p.A. disclosed a transaction involving Nicola Perin, a person discharging managerial responsibilities at the company, who sold a total of 22,000 ordinary shares. The disposal, executed through multiple trades at prices around €4.8883 per share and not linked to any share option programme, reflects standard insider dealing transparency requirements under EU Regulation 596/2014, providing investors with visibility on management’s trading in the stock.

The aggregated sale at a weighted average price of €4.8883 highlights a modest reduction in the manager’s exposure rather than any stated change in corporate strategy. While the filing does not indicate specific strategic implications, such notifications are closely watched by the market as they can inform perceptions of insider sentiment and governance practices, reinforcing regulatory oversight and disclosure standards for listed issuers like OVS.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:OVS) stock is a Buy with a EUR5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on OVS S.p.A. stock, see the IT:OVS Stock Forecast page.

More about OVS S.p.A.

OVS S.p.A. is an Italian listed company whose ordinary shares trade under ISIN IT0005043507. The group operates in the retail sector, with its stock subject to disclosure obligations for transactions carried out by managers in accordance with European market abuse regulations.

data.title: Maris-Tech Wins First Major Production Order for Jupiter Drone Systems from Leading Loitering Munitions Maker
data.description:

An update from Maris-Tech Ltd. ( (MTEK) ) is now available.

On February 19, 2026, Maris-Tech announced it had received its first substantial production order from a new customer that is a leading player in the defense loitering munitions market, following successful pilot projects and initial system validation. The contract transitions the company’s Jupiter Drone edge video processing platform from evaluation to full operational deployment, signaling growing adoption of its technology in next-generation unmanned defense systems and reinforcing its position in the loitering munitions segment.

The order reflects confidence in the maturity and integration readiness of Maris-Tech’s edge AI architecture, which supports autonomous targeting, situational awareness and real-time decision-making under strict size, weight, power and connectivity constraints. While financial terms were not disclosed, the move from pilot to production supply suggests a potential step-up in recurring demand from a strategically important defense customer and may enhance Maris-Tech’s visibility and credibility with other security and defense integrators.

The most recent analyst rating on (MTEK) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Maris-Tech Ltd. stock, see the MTEK Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MTEK is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance—ongoing losses, negative operating/free cash flow, and balance-sheet leverage risk—despite solid revenue growth. Technical indicators provide some near-term support (positive momentum above short-term averages), but valuation remains challenged due to unprofitability and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on MTEK stock, click here.

More about Maris-Tech Ltd.

Maris-Tech Ltd., headquartered in Rehovot, Israel, is a global provider of AI-based edge computing and video processing solutions for mission-critical defense and security applications. Its SWaP-optimized, ruggedized Jupiter platforms deliver ultra-low-latency video encoding and onboard AI analytics for UAVs, loitering munitions, UGVs, armored vehicles and dismounted soldier systems operating in bandwidth- and latency-constrained environments.

data.title: Bitcoin Depot Announces One-for-Seven Reverse Stock Split
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Bitcoin Depot ( (BTM) ) has provided an announcement.

Bitcoin Depot Inc., a leading North American provider of cash-to-bitcoin kiosks and related services, announced on February 19, 2026, that it will implement a one-for-seven reverse stock split of its common stock, effective February 23, 2026, with its Class A shares continuing to trade on Nasdaq under the ticker BTM. The move, approved by stockholders in January 2026 and the board on February 12, 2026, will not change the company’s authorized share counts, will cash out fractional shares, and will proportionally adjust warrants and equity awards so that investors’ percentage ownership remains effectively unchanged aside from fractional-share treatment.

As part of the reverse split, the company will adjust the number of Class A shares underlying public warrants and increase the warrant exercise price to maintain economic equivalence, while also proportionately modifying equity-based awards and other convertible securities. The announcement marks a capital-structure change that consolidates the share count and is designed to apply uniformly across all stockholders, with no action required from investors holding shares through brokers or in street name.

The most recent analyst rating on (BTM) stock is a Hold with a $0.96 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bitcoin Depot stock, see the BTM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BTM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BTM is a Neutral.

BTM scores mid-range primarily due to mixed financial fundamentals—strong cash flow and improving operating results contrasted with high leverage—and very weak technicals showing a steep downtrend. Low valuation supports the score, while earnings-call results were strong but tempered by softer near-term guidance and regulatory headwinds; corporate events add modest positives but with notable legal overhang.

To see Spark’s full report on BTM stock, click here.

More about Bitcoin Depot

Bitcoin Depot, founded in 2016, operates in the cryptocurrency and digital payments infrastructure sector, providing kiosks and related services that convert cash into bitcoin for use in payments, spending and investing. The Atlanta-based company says it has the largest market share in North America, with more than 9,000 kiosks globally as of August 2025 and cash-to-crypto access at retailers in dozens of U.S. states.

The company targets consumers who prefer using cash but want access to the broader digital financial system, offering its services through Bitcoin Depot-branded kiosks in 47 states and via its BDCheckout product at thousands of name-brand retail locations in 31 states. Its platform is positioned to bridge traditional cash users with the cryptocurrency ecosystem, reinforcing its role as a major physical access point to bitcoin in North America.

Average Trading Volume: 1,034,692

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $68.47M

For an in-depth examination of BTM stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Stardust Solar Enters Atlanta to Drive Next Phase of U.S. Growth
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Stardust Solar Energy Inc. ( (TSE:SUN) ) has issued an announcement.

Stardust Solar Energy Inc., a renewable energy company specializing in residential, commercial, and utility-scale solar solutions, is expanding globally through a diversified royalty platform, technology offerings, and training programs that support recurring revenue and international deployment. The company collaborates with governments, utilities, and commercial partners to accelerate solar adoption and build out clean-energy infrastructure in high-growth markets.

The company has announced its entry into the Atlanta, Georgia market as part of its broader U.S. growth strategy and global push to scale solar and battery solutions. Management highlights Atlanta’s rapid population growth, rising electricity demand, and Georgia’s position as a leading solar state as key drivers, positioning the city as a scalable hub for residential, commercial, and industrial solar adoption across the Southeast.

Stardust Solar plans to leverage its established operating framework, which emphasizes standardized training, development, and consistent delivery, to ensure local execution in Atlanta aligns with its global sustainability and growth objectives. The move is intended to strengthen the company’s North American footprint, support distributed solar and battery deployment, and enhance long-term energy resilience and cost predictability for customers while advancing renewable energy capacity worldwide.

More about Stardust Solar Energy Inc.

Stardust Solar Energy Inc. is a globally expanding renewable energy company focused on the installation, development, training, and deployment of residential, commercial, and utility-scale solar solutions across international markets. It operates a diversified solar royalty platform that generates recurring revenue through clean-energy franchise installation operations, technology initiatives such as its StarDroid AI device, and training and development licences and subscriptions, while working with governments, utilities, and commercial stakeholders to scale renewable energy capacity worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 105,051

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$5.25M

data.title: HEG Limited Discloses Promoter Group Share Transaction Under SEBI Insider Trading Rules
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

HEG Limited ( (IN:HEG) ) has provided an update.

HEG Limited has reported to the stock exchanges that members of its promoter group have made continual disclosures under Regulation 7(2) read with Regulation 6(2) of SEBI’s Prohibition of Insider Trading Regulations, 2015. The filing details a market sale transaction by promoter group member Nivedan Churiwal on the NSE, reflecting a small change in promoter holdings and underscoring the company’s ongoing compliance with Indian insider trading disclosure norms.

The disclosure signals routine promoter-level share dealing rather than a strategic shift, as the transaction size represents only a minor fraction of the company’s equity capital. For investors and regulators, the update primarily serves to maintain transparency around insider trades, supporting market integrity and providing visibility into changes in the promoter group’s stake in HEG Limited.

More about HEG Limited

HEG Limited operates in the graphite electrode and related carbon products industry, supplying critical inputs primarily to electric arc furnace steel manufacturers and other industrial users. The company is listed on both BSE and the National Stock Exchange of India, giving it access to a broad base of institutional and retail investors in the domestic capital markets.

data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest announcement is out from Heritage Distilling Holding Company ( (IPST) ).

On February 19, 2026, IP Strategy Holdings, Inc. announced that its board had approved a share repurchase program authorizing the buyback of up to 1 million shares of common stock by December 31, 2026, equivalent to nearly 10% of its 10.3 million shares outstanding. The company may execute the repurchases via open market purchases, privately negotiated deals, or a Rule 10b5-1 plan, a move that could boost earnings per share and signal management’s view that the stock is undervalued.

IP Strategy highlighted that it is the largest independent owner of $IP tokens, holding 53.2 million tokens tied to the Story Layer 1 blockchain, and has begun shifting from self-custodied to third-party custodied validator operations, a change expected to materially increase validator yield in 2026. Coupled with previously announced cost-cutting and streamlining measures, management framed the buyback authorization as a strong vote of confidence in its token-backed treasury model, recurring revenue potential, and long-term growth strategy, with implications for shareholders through potential capital returns and a tighter equity float.

The most recent analyst rating on (IPST) stock is a Hold with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Heritage Distilling Holding Company stock, see the IPST Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IPST is a Neutral.

Positive corporate events (reduced dilution risk and operational progress) provide support but are not enough to outweigh the technical and cash-flow risks.

To see Spark’s full report on IPST stock, click here.

More about Heritage Distilling Holding Company

IP Strategy Holdings, Inc. is a Nasdaq-listed company that holds $IP tokens as a primary reserve asset and operates a validator for the Story Protocol, an AI-native blockchain focused on programmable intellectual property. The company positions itself as a gateway for public market investors to access the roughly $80 trillion programmable IP economy through a regulated equity vehicle, using its $IP token treasury to participate directly in Story’s on-chain IP registration, licensing, and monetization ecosystem.

data.title: Thesis Gold Raises C$44 Million in Strategic Financing from AngloGold Ashanti and Centerra
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Thesis Gold Inc ( (TSE:TAU) ).

Thesis Gold Inc. has secured a C$44.4 million strategic financing led by AngloGold Ashanti, which will acquire a 5% stake via a private placement, with Centerra Gold exercising its rights to maintain a 9.9% holding. The financing strengthens Thesis Gold’s shareholder base with two major industry partners, provides capital for technical studies at its flagship Lawyers-Ranch gold-silver project, and enhances its positioning as it works to de-risk and advance the project toward potential development.

Under the transaction, AngloGold Ashanti will purchase 13,858,883 common shares at C$2.79 each, while Centerra Gold will subscribe for 2,059,730 shares at the same price, with all shares subject to a statutory hold period and standard regulatory approvals. The proceeds will be used for working capital and ongoing project studies, and AngloGold Ashanti will receive investor rights, including participation and technical committee appointment rights, potentially adding operational expertise and strategic support as Thesis Gold progresses its development plans.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:TAU) stock is a Hold with a C$3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Thesis Gold Inc stock, see the TSE:TAU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:TAU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:TAU is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by pre-revenue financial performance and volatile cash burn (funding risk), partially offset by a strong low-leverage balance sheet. Technicals add support due to a clear uptrend and positive momentum, while valuation remains a caution given negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:TAU stock, click here.

More about Thesis Gold Inc

Thesis Gold Inc. is a precious metals development company focused on its 100%-owned Lawyers-Ranch gold-silver project in British Columbia’s Toodoggone Mining District. A recent prefeasibility study highlighted robust economics for the project, and the company is advancing through environmental assessment with plans to commence a feasibility study in 2026.

data.title: Saga Metals Extends Thick Oxide Zones at Labrador Radar Project
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Saga Metals Corp. ( (TSE:SAGA) ) just unveiled an update.

Saga Metals Corp. reported further progress on its 2026 maiden mineral resource estimate drilling campaign at the Trapper Zone of its wholly owned Radar Titanium-Vanadium-Iron Project in Labrador. The company has now completed ten diamond drill holes totaling 2,039 metres at Trapper South, with all logged holes confirming significant oxide mineralization, including semi-massive and rhythmically layered oxides up to 111.67 metres thick.

Preliminary logging shows oxide horizons averaging around 100 metres in thickness and increasing concentrations of semi-massive oxides in the southeastern and southwestern anomalies, suggesting greater mineral continuity than earlier drilling. These results, supported by 3D magnetic inversion data, indicate roughly 700 metres of continuous oxide strike and potentially enhance the scale and quality of the emerging resource, with assays from initial holes pending and additional drill holes currently being logged and drilled.

More about Saga Metals Corp.

Saga Metals Corp. is a North American mineral exploration company focused on discovering and advancing critical mineral deposits. Its primary efforts are directed at the Radar Titanium-Vanadium-Iron Project near Cartwright in Labrador, Canada, where it is targeting large oxide mineralized zones that could support a future mineral resource estimate and potential supply of strategic metals.

Average Trading Volume: 387,848

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$49.62M

See more insights into SAGA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: News Corp Highlights $1 Billion Share Repurchase Program
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

News Corp ( (NWSA) ) has shared an announcement.

News Corporation has reminded investors that it operates a stock repurchase program authorizing the buyback of up to $1 billion of its outstanding Class A and Class B common stock, with daily transaction disclosures made to the Australian Securities Exchange and further details included in its periodic U.S. filings. In an Appendix 3C dated 19 February 2026, the company notified the ASX that under its 2025 Repurchase Program it may, subject to market conditions, repurchase up to $1 billion of Nasdaq-listed shares, excluding ASX-listed CDIs, from a total Class A float of 368,638,731 shares, with Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC acting as broker and the stated objective of enhancing shareholder value, while past documentation also referenced an anticipated buy-back date of 22 September 2021.

The buy-back is part of News Corp’s capital management strategy to repurchase up to $1 billion of shares. The program targets Nasdaq-listed Class A and B stock, excluding CDIs, with Goldman Sachs executing trades.

News Corp notified the ASX on 19 February 2026 of its ongoing 2025 Repurchase Program. The company aims to enhance shareholder value while providing regular disclosures to regulators and investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (NWSA) stock is a Buy with a $25.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on News Corp stock, see the NWSA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NWSA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NWSA is a Neutral.

The score is supported mainly by improved fundamentals (stronger margins, better ROE, and manageable/improving leverage) and a constructive earnings call pointing to strong free-cash-flow growth and accelerated buybacks. It is held back by weak technicals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD) and a less attractive valuation profile (high P/E and low dividend yield), alongside some cash-conversion and revenue-consistency risks.

To see Spark’s full report on NWSA stock, click here.

More about News Corp

News Corporation is a global media and information services company with shares listed on Nasdaq and the Australian Securities Exchange. It issues Class A and Class B common stock and uses capital management tools, including share repurchase programs, to manage its equity base and seek to enhance shareholder value across its international investor base.

Average Trading Volume: 3,843,459

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell
